name: leak_critical_event
description: RMC subscribes for events; a critical leak is injected; RMC must receive LeakDetectedCritical.

subscribe.description: RMC registers a push (webhook) subscription. No RegistryPrefixes filter: bmcweb filters sendEvent()-generated leak events out of registry-filtered subscriptions, so the RMC subscribes broadly and matches the specific leak event by MessageId/Severity below.

trigger.description: Inject a critical leak: set leak_sensor_1 -> Critical in STATE_DB.

expect_event.description: Within 15s, an event for leak_sensor_1 (LeakDetectedCritical, severity Critical) must arrive.

teardown.description: Restore leak_sensor_1 to OK so later tests start clean.

name: leak_recovery_event
description: After a leak, clearing it must produce a LeakDetectedNormal recovery event.

subscribe.description: RMC registers a push (webhook) subscription. No RegistryPrefixes filter: bmcweb filters sendEvent()-generated leak events out of registry-filtered subscriptions, so the RMC subscribes broadly and matches the specific leak event by MessageId/Severity below.

trigger.description: Let the critical event settle before clearing.
Clear the leak to drive a recovery event.

expect_event.description: Within 15s, a LeakDetectedNormal event (severity OK) must arrive; the intermediate Critical event is skipped by the matcher.
